entries.definition: an unmanned aircraft or ship guided remotely or autonomously
entries.exampleSentence: The drone captured stunning aerial footage of the coastline.

entries.definition: a male bee that has no sting, does no work, and exists solely to mate with the queen
entries.exampleSentence: The worker bees eventually drive the drones out of the hive before winter.

entries.definition: a continuous low humming or buzzing sound
entries.exampleSentence: The steady drone of the engine put me to sleep on the long drive.

entries.definition: to make a continuous low humming sound
entries.exampleSentence: A lawnmower droned somewhere in the distance.

entries.definition: to speak in a monotonous, tedious tone
entries.exampleSentence: The professor droned on for two hours about medieval tax records.
